name: Stupid Cars
detailed_description:
These drivers are, you guessed it… STUPID! They need your help. Select their vehicles to change speed and guide them as they merge in to the flow of traffic. But be careful, these cars can’t stop… if there’s a collision, it’s all over.

Perfect for casual players, but also offering optional challenges for the purists.
Designed to be one of the most challenging "one more go" games around, it features.

- Cute, polished art style and animations
- Catchy original soundtrack
- Simple easy to learn gameplay
- Unique, challenging levels
- Leaderboards to compete with the world or friends
- 10 achievements for those perfectionists looking for an extra challenge
- With great risk, comes great reward. Play with “Turbo” and “Overtake” modes.
